```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement API mocking for development and testing"
---
# API Mocking
## Task
Create API mocks for frontend development and testing.
## Requirements
1. Generate mocks from OpenAPI spec. 2. Support dynamic response generation.
3. Simulate latency and error scenarios. 4. Record requests for assertion.
5. Support mock server hot-reload on spec changes.
## Constraints
- Mocks must match API spec exactly. Support all HTTP methods. Return realistic data.
## Success Criteria
- Mocks match API behavior. Dynamic responses work. Errors simulated. Requests recorded.
```
